rulings.Case Title: DAVID ABRAMOVITZ ET AL VS. FARHAT BAJJALIYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs David Abramovitz, Blair Bridges, Myriam Fallon, Adrienne Knoll, Lauren Lederman And Lance Shannon'S Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Geoff Hazard; Request For Evidentiary Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And They Attorney Of Record, Todd Angstadt, In The Amount Of $2,474
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2017, Line 1. Plaintiffs David Abramovitz, Blair Bridges, Myriam Fallon, Adrienne Knoll, Lauren Lederman And Lance Shannon'S Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Geoff Hazard; Request For Evidentiary Sanctions And Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants And They Attorney Of Record, Todd Angstadt, In The Amount Of $2,474 is DENIED. Requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE LAP-HO WELGE-LUESSEN VS. GEORG YU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2017, Line 2. PLAINTIFF ALICE WELGE-LUESSEN Re-Notice Of Motion is OFF CALENDAR. There is a notice of appeal in this matter. According to CRC 8.36(A) the motion for substitution must be made in the reviewed Court. Parties have been advised of the Court's inclination to take this matter off calendar by July 9, 2018 tentative ruling. Neither opposition nor reply filed after July 9, 2018 addressed this issue. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES BEVELACQUA VS. MAGGIE KAO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Special Appearing Defendant Maggie Kao'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2017, Line 5. DEFENDANT MAGGIE KAO Special Appearing Defendant Maggie Kao'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Any purported service by posting and mailing prior to June 28, 2018 service is quashed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ANN DARSKY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion To Quash Service Of Summons & Complaint, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Supporting Declaration, Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 24, 2017, Line 6. DEFENDANT ANN DARSKY Notice Of Motion & Motion To Quash Service Of Summons & Complaint, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Supporting Declaration, Proof Of Service is DENIED. Defendant was personally served by a registered process server. Defendant failed to meet her burden to overcome the presumption. = (501/REQ)
